seed_instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same?
org_constraint: The third paragraph invites recipients to join.
new_constraint: The third paragraph should focus on summarizing the content without including any invitations.

Subject: Starting a New Book Club – Ideas & Details

Hi everyone,

We’ve been talking a lot lately about getting more involved in our hobbies, and a few of us have come up with a great idea to form a casual book club. We feel like it would be wonderful to share our love of stories and connect over new literature we discover together. This feels like the perfect opportunity to bond while expanding our horizons.

Our plan is to gather once a month via video call to discuss our selections. Each meeting will run for about forty-five minutes, giving plenty of time for deep conversation without feeling rushed. We want to keep the format flexible so that people can contribute as much or as little as they wish to during the discussion time.

In terms of content, we intend to rotate through three different novels each season to encourage variety. We will focus on themes ranging from character-driven drama to social commentary, selecting titles based on member interest and availability. The discussions will center around key plot points and personal takeaways rather than academic analysis, creating a relaxed environment for all participants.

If you are interested in becoming a regular attendee, please reply to this message by the end of the week so we can finalize the roster. We look forward to hearing from you and potentially welcoming you to our first gathering.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Starting a New Book Club – Ideas & Details

Hi everyone,

We’ve been talking a lot lately about getting more involved in our hobbies, and a few of us have come up with a great idea to form a casual book club. We feel like it would be wonderful to share our love of stories and connect over new literature we discover together. This feels like the perfect opportunity to bond while expanding our horizons.

Our plan is to gather once a month via video call to discuss our selections. Each meeting will run for about forty-five minutes, giving plenty of time for deep conversation without feeling rushed. We want to keep the format flexible so that people can contribute as much or as little as they wish to during the discussion time.

In terms of content, we intend to rotate through three different novels each season to encourage variety. We will focus on themes ranging from character-driven drama to social commentary, selecting titles based on member interest and availability. The discussions will center around key plot points and personal takeaways rather than academic analysis, creating a relaxed environment for all participants.

If you are interested in becoming a regular attendee, please reply to this message by the end of the week so we can finalize the roster. We look forward to hearing from you and potentially welcoming you to our first gathering.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
